programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world’s worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council’s high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Forbidden Science - Age of Cyborgs
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

Set in Los Angeles, the film explores fascinating portraits of struggling musicians, fans and star-struck groupies. Featuring Alice Cooper, Ozzy Osbourne, Poison and members of Aerosmith, Kiss, and Motorhead as well as performances by Megadeath, Faster Pussycat, Lizzy Borden, London, Odin and Seduce, this raucous and entertaining chapter also chronicles the lonely naiveté of the striving bands, the endless flow of alcohol and drugs and the relentless sexism.

The Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surf Championships involve the world’s best big-wave tow-in surfers including World Champion Garrett MacNamara and XXL champion Brad Gerlach who, along with 20 other world-class surfers, attempt to tame this monster of the sea.

programme.title: California's Wild Coast
programme.desc: Soar with the seabirds over the wild and beautiful north coast of California. The rugged coastline of Mendocino is a vast wilderness full of wildlife, sea caves, bird colonies, and crashing waves that can only be fully appreciated from an aerial view. This 2.5 hour film is an exhilarating flight over this magnificent landscape. Soul stirring ambient music accompanies the spectacular cinematography of "California's Wild Coast"

programme.title: Hawaii & The Caribbean
programme.desc: Experience the spectacular beauty of the islands in this 1 hour film featuring the photography of Elizabeth & Olof Carmel. Relax with views of tropical beaches at sunset, aerial views of otherworldly Kauai, and enchanting waterfalls, waves, and sea turtles. This film Includes a soothing island themed soundtrack.

programme.title: Preview for Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: 🌊 Europe’s Natural Wonders, Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Official Preview Trailer ✨ Step into a fairytale world of turquoise lakes, cascading waterfalls, and emerald forests in Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes National Park — one of Europe’s most extraordinary natural treasures. This short film is the official preview trailer for our full 2-hour cinematic nature experience, Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes, now streaming in breathtaking 4K on NatureStream.tv. 🎬 Journey along elevated wooden boardwalks as crystal waters flow from one lake to another through lush karst landscapes. Captured in ultra-high resolution, this film immerses you in the sights and sounds of one of UNESCO’s most iconic World Heritage Sites.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Idaho Kid (1960)
programme.desc: A tough, straight-shooting cowboy known as the Idaho Kid rides into a lawless frontier town and finds himself caught between ruthless outlaws and desperate townsfolk. As tensions rise, he must use his wits and gun skills to bring order and protect the innocent, all while confronting his own past.

programme.title: Law Men 1944
programme.desc: Federal agents go undercover to break up a gang of outlaws terrorizing the frontier, facing danger and deception as they work to restore law and order

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans , S1E30 False Faces
programme.desc: Hard Hombre -Hoot Gibson 1931

programme.title: Range Warfare (1935)
programme.desc: A cowboy returns to his hometown to find it under the control of a ruthless gang, and sets out to expose their crimes and restore order with the help of loyal allies

programme.title: Rock River Renegades (1942)
programme.desc: The Range Busters investigate a series of robberies along the Rock River, uncovering a gang of outlaws using the waterway to carry out their crimes as they work to bring the culprits to justice.

programme.title: Keoma The Avenger 1976
programme.desc: In Keoma the Avenger, Franco Nero stars as a half-breed gunslinger who returns home from the Civil War to find his town enslaved by tyranny and violence. Haunted by visions and driven by a fierce sense of justice, Keoma faces his ruthless half-brothers and a brutal warlord in a struggle for freedom. With its haunting atmosphere, gritty violence, and powerful performances, this Spaghetti Western classic blends myth and vengeance into an unforgettable tale.

programme.title: Ben and Charlie 1972
programme.desc: In Ben and Charlie, Giuliano Gemma and George Eastman team up in a Spaghetti Western full of action, humor, and mischief. Ben, a smooth-talking drifter, and Charlie, a hot-tempered brawler, form an unlikely partnership as they stumble from one scheme to another across the frontier. Chased by outlaws, double-crossed by swindlers, and forever at odds with each other, the two rogues turn trouble into adventure at every turn. With sharp banter, lively gunfights, and offbeat charm, this buddy Western proves that friendship can be as wild as the West itself.

programme.title: West of Cimarron
programme.desc: The Mesquiteers return to Texas after the Civil War to find Army carpetbaggers fighting the local bushwackers. They quickly learn that Capt. Hawks and his men are the culprits and join up with Morgan and his men.

programme.title: Heart Of The Golden West
programme.desc: Lambert owns the trucking line that ships cattle to market. When he raises his rates Roy decides to ship the cattle on the River Boat. When Lambert and his men are unable to stop the boat, they rustle the cattle.

programme.title: Son of Renegade
programme.desc: In a throw-back to the1930's indie westerns, Red River Johnny gathers his friends (most of whom are called some variation of the name Bill) and returns to claim the heritage of his father who was outlawed.
